posts.title: Why AI Staffing Is Still Broken (And How to Fix It)
posts.description: Most AI staffing tools are glorified resume filters. Here's what real orchestration looks like.
posts.excerpt: Most AI staffing tools are glorified resume filters. They optimize for speed, not fit. And in healthcare, that distinction costs lives.

posts.title: From Agency to SaaS: What I Learned Running Both
posts.description: After running a marketing agency for years, pivoting to product-led growth required rewiring everything I thought I knew about building a business.
posts.excerpt: After running a marketing agency for years, pivoting to product-led growth required rewiring everything I thought I knew about building a business.

posts.title: The Ethics of Automating Healthcare Hiring
posts.description: Automation in healthcare hiring isn't just a technical problem. It's a moral one. Here's how we're thinking about it.
posts.excerpt: Automation in healthcare hiring isn't just a technical problem. It's a moral one. When the wrong hire can cost a patient their life, the bar for AI decision-making is fundamentally different.

posts.title: Building an AI-First Culture at a 12-Person Startup
posts.description: AI-first isn't a tech decision. It's a hiring, process, and mindset shift that has to start at the top.
posts.excerpt: AI-first isn't a tech decision. It's a hiring, process, and mindset shift that has to start at the top.

posts.title: Orchestration vs. Automation: Why the Distinction Matters
posts.description: Automation does a task. Orchestration manages a system. In healthcare staffing, the difference is everything.
posts.excerpt: Automation does a task. Orchestration manages a system. In healthcare staffing, the difference is everything.
